---
title: "pennyone.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/bin/pennyone.js"
loc: 105
complexity: 9
logic_score: 5.05
style_score: 3.65
intel_score: 3.69
overall_score: 2.90
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Command](file://commander)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [runScan](file://../src/tools/pennyone/index.js)
- [startBridge](file://../src/tools/pennyone/vis/server.js)

### Exports
- `program`
- `results`
- `m`
- `getScoreColor`
- `totalLoc`
- `avgScore`
- `avgLogic`
- `avgStyle`
- `avgIntel`
- `outliers`
- `logicOutliers`
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `graph`
- `knownFiles`
- `reportFiles`
- `removed`
